questionHtml:
What is the role of HCG in early pregnancy?

A. It prevents the degeneration of the corpus luteum in the ovary.

B. It initiates the development of the uterus lining.

C. It inhibits the production of estrogen.

D. It stimulates uterine contractions.

meta.title: What is the role of HCG in early pregnancy? A. It prevents the degeneration of the corpus luteum in the ovary. B. It initiates the development of the uterus lining. C. It inhibits
